pendingEntryWithinMs.note: Grafana's scheduler delayed first eval by ~3 min after rule creation (newly-provisioned rule warmup). Our evaluator anchors at samples[0].t and sees the threshold cross immediately, so Pending starts ~172s earlier than Grafana's observed activeAt. Documented as a `Grafana scheduler runtime artifact` in docs/02-architecture.md — not a target for the evaluator to model. Loosened tolerance to 300000ms (5 min) to accommodate; the firingEntryOffsetFromPending assertion below verifies the load-bearing for-gate algorithm.

firingEntryOffsetFromPending.note: Tight tolerance — this is the algorithm we're actually testing. Firing must enter exactly `for: 2m` after Pending, regardless of where Pending starts.
